outfit_info.outfit_description: A striking urban ensemble featuring an oversized black leather jacket layered over a flowing white lace-trimmed midi dress. This is paired with relaxed black leather wide-leg pants and dynamic silver sneakers, completed by a chic black leather tote, blending edgy and ethereal styles.

model_attributes.body: Slender physique with a relaxed posture, exuding a confident and contemporary fashion sensibility.
model_attributes.pose: Standing casually with one hand holding a bag, facing forward with a calm and natural demeanor.
model_attributes.background: A minimalist, clean white studio background provides stark contrast, highlighting the outfit.
